罗兰来到了赛博朋克世界的2066年，获得了源计划系统，自此，又一个巨企在夜之城缓缓升起。
多年之后，罗兰手里放着一只有着菱形头部的机械小蜘蛛，怀里抱着露西，随后看向窗外，外面的世界依旧绚丽夺目，只不过悄然间已经发生了一些改变。
等到某个人被记者采访问起荒坂等公司时。
“荒坂塔？夜之城没有这种建筑了，剩下的……”
那人缓缓抬起头，看向自己身后那无比巨大的倒立着的三角形标志。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o284ab5db90727fd2706837fde72dbfaa~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"莫莫在此","author_id":"","book_id":"7389881031920208958","book_name":"给赛博朋克带来一点源计划震撼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281030","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4462人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":39,"name":"二次元","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=39&name=二次元&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":538,"name":"同人","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=538&name=同人&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":873,"name":"赛博朋克","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=873&name=赛博朋克&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7391481308418949656","read_count":"4462","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"714134"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"340","tags":"动漫衍生,系统,穿越,二次元,同人,赛博朋克,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o284ab5db90727fd2706837fde72dbfaa~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779285945&x-signature=RqXYsUaqQaL2Uo%2BUJDm4rdSEU9Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"952599160563671","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"65"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260321220545D099B740AEEC
